'''Erigorm''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> After the [[Great Galactic War]], Erigorm was one of the planets that threatened secession from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], as part of the [[Rift Alliance]].<ref name="TOR" /> By that time, it had recorded and administrated the Republic's finances for centuries.<ref name="TOR" />
The planet's representative in the Alliance council was [[Augin Blaesus]], secretly a [[Children of the Emperor|Child of the Emperor]].<ref name="TOR" /> Prior to the Clone Wars, the planet was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Gopple]].<ref name="ISB" />
